subcodes.first_line: All existence beareth witness that thy Lord doth bestow grace upon His servants, and among His names are the All-Merciful, the Most Compassionate. Therefore, be thou confident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد الوجود بان ربک فضال علی عباده و من اسمائه الرحمن الرحیم فاطمئن بفضل
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
